Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC030 "STORMLORD-0400-C030" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Stormlord.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0400 to set the port A data direction register ($DC02) to $3B to allow the game to run correctly.
Also made the following changes: 1. NOP'd out the BNE $7AC3 instruction at $7ABE to skip the redefine keys screen 2. Changed the JMP $7B57 instruction at $7AC0 to be JMP $1400 instead 3. Added a small routine at $1400 to set $1B to $07 so that the game defaults to joystick. The routine then jumps to $7B57 to carry on the normal code flow.
